title: artemisia marschalliana var. tschernieviana
intro: Artemisia marschalliana var. tschernieviana, also known as Russian wormwood, is a plant species within the genus Artemisia, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Russian wormwood include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Russian wormwood can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
